introSection: Alpen-Coaster is a travelling steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently owned and travelled by the Vorlop family in Germany.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and green supports. The ride opened with blue track and white supports, being repainted to blue track and red supports at Schwaben Park.

fullText:
Alpen-Coaster is a travelling steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently owned and travelled by the Vorlop family in Germany.



Blue track and green supports. The ride opened with blue track and white supports, being repainted to blue track and red supports at Schwaben Park.
